Step 5: Open “Bigger Solution” Loop
This is used for your last tip only. This step opens a
loop and transitions the viewer into Step 4 of the 5-Step
VSL Process: 	The Bigger Solution.

-- 7 of 146 --

Here’s how you discover your lie(s):
1. Look at Part 3 in your Snap Suggestion Assignment;
2. Create your Big Lie (1 lie minimum; 3 lies maximum)
from your withouts exercise. The “withouts” are the
lies that your prospect probably believes they need to
do in order to see results from your product/service.
Example: 	One of my 3 “withouts” was, “…without
starving yourself skinny.” Therefore, my Big Lie is
simply, “Many people have been led to believe you
have to starve yourself skinny…”
The next few slides are template slides, including
this lie and the transition that begins the lie…
